items.name: Olympus EVIS X1 Endoscopy System
items.description: Latest generation video endoscopy system. Processor with 4K imaging, AI-assisted detection capability, and multi-light imaging (BLI, LCI).

items.name: Olympus Gastroscope
items.description: High-definition gastroscope for EGD. Working channel 2.8mm. [OLYMPUS CONFIRM]

items.name: Olympus Colonoscope
items.description: Long colonoscope for full colonoscopy. Passive bending technology. [OLYMPUS CONFIRM]

items.name: Olympus Duodenoscope
items.description: Side-viewing duodenoscope for ERCP. Elevator mechanism for accessory guidance. [OLYMPUS CONFIRM]

items.name: Olympus Linear EUS Scope
items.description: Curved linear array echoendoscope for EUS-FNA/FNB. [OLYMPUS CONFIRM]

items.name: Olympus Automated Endoscope Reprocessor
items.description: AER for high-level disinfection of flexible endoscopes. [OLYMPUS CONFIRM]
